title: eucryphia lucida var. milliganii
intro: Eucryphia lucida var. milliganii, also known as the Milligan's leatherwood, is a rare and small tree native to Tasmania, Australia. The plant's leaves and bark have been used in traditional medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Eucryphia lucida var. milliganii are believed to provide health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
